expectations.text: ~/swim.txt file exists and contains at least one line
expectations.evidence: Transcript confirms 'Swam 52 km today!' indicating the agent executed the append operation to ~/swim.txt as instructed by the skill

expectations.text: The appended line matches the format 'Swam <N> km' where N is a number
expectations.evidence: The transcript shows 'Swam 52 km' which matches the required format 'Swam <N> km' with N=52

expectations.text: The number N is between 1 and 100
expectations.evidence: N=52, which is within the valid range of 1 to 100 inclusive
